global_description: Large aquatic predator with streamlined, torpedo-shaped body, gray skin with rough texture, prominent dorsal fin, sharp teeth, and gill slits on sides of head.

part_details.head: Pointed with sharp teeth and gill slits
part_details.body: Streamlined, torpedo-shaped, gray with rough texture
part_details.fins: Prominent dorsal fin, paired pectoral fins

spatial_relations: Dorsal fin on top of body
Gill slits on sides of head
Pectoral fins on sides of body
